feedback.summary: G-003 DateFilter implementation achieves 100/90 score. All 24 rubric items evaluated (17 YES, 0 NO, 7 N/A). Core deliverables: dateRangeFilterFn filterFn + DateFilter component + peerDependencies (react-datepicker, date-fns) + ADR documentation. Spec-compliance: 100% match on API signatures, acceptance criteria, truth table. No regressions on G-001/G-002 (TextFilter/NumberFilter exports preserved). Infrastructure changes (4 files) justified by ADR-004 (skipLibCheck) + C-22 (peerDeps externalize) + C-21 (bundle size). Constraints: C-4 (no any), C-5 (Tailwind only), C-9 (ADR), C-22 (peerDependencies), C-29 (spread-skip optional props), C-30 (truth table complete), C-31 (wiring audit pass). Ready for verification stage.

detailedAssessment.metaGateQuality: F-01 to F-06 all PASS. No environment issues, no hallucinated files, spec-to-code alignment perfect. Spec internal code defects N/A (no executable templates in spec). Implementer correctly handled spec D# decisions.
detailedAssessment.specCompliance: Section 2 AC-001~007 all satisfied. Section 5 Truth Table (T1~T14) all implemented in filterFns. Section 4 Design Decisions (D1~D12) all reflected in code. Section 8 TypeScript Interfaces match spec exactly. Section 12 Usage Examples all valid. Wiring: dateRangeFilterFn imported + called in Storybook (C-31).
detailedAssessment.codeQuality: B-01~B-07 all YES. tsc strict, zero any/implicit, zero Wijmo, zero mock in production, Tailwind-only styling, ESLint pass. react-hooks rules: N/A (no hooks in implementation). Exhaustive checking (L68-69, filterFns.ts) present.
detailedAssessment.bundleCompliance: E-01 PASS: size-limit honored (4.04 KB brotli << 20 KB limit). E-02 PASS: 4 ADRs with trade-offs. E-03 PASS: MIT license declared. peerDependencies correct (C-22 + C-21 honored). External entries in tsup + .size-limit ignore array correctly configured.
detailedAssessment.regressionCheck: Zero regressions on MOD-GRID-09 G-001 (TextFilter) and G-002 (NumberFilter). All existing exports preserved (index.ts L30-50), filterFns.ts L41-165 unchanged, types.ts L18-140 unchanged. New exports appended (L52-58) in clean separation.
detailedAssessment.infrastructureJustification: 4 infra files modified (tsconfig, tsup.config, .size-limit.json, package.json). All justified: ADR-004 (react-datepicker @18.3.x type incompatibility), C-22 (peerDeps bundling), C-21 (size tracking), spec D2/D3 (peerDependencies). Surgical changes: each file edit minimal + non-invasive to existing configs.
